data.title: Mercantile Bank and FHLBank Indianapolis award $2.2 million in grants to West Michigan nonprofits for affordable housing.
data.description: A recent partnership between Mercantile Bank and the Federal Home Loan Bank of Indianapolis aims to broaden affordable housing choices and boost investments in neighborhoods and the local economy of Grand Rapids, Michigan. The collaboration, announced on Jan 13, 2026, seeks to address housing affordability issues by leveraging resources and support. This initiative is anticipated to make a significant impact by helping a larger number of individuals find affordable housing solutions and by driving economic growth in the area.

data.title: EMCO Industries introduces high-performance mono-leaf spring for U.S. trailer OEMs, with increased domestic production at new facility.
data.description: An Oklahoma-based manufacturer, EMCO Industries, announced plans to enhance its on-time delivery and boost domestic production at its state-of-the-art facility amidst uncertain times. The company, recognized for producing leaf springs for trailers, is headquartered in Tulsa. The initiative is set to increase their manufacturing capacity and bolster efficiency. The developments are expected to position the manufacturer strongly in the market. The upgrade is part of their strategy to navigate challenging conditions while maintaining quality.

US Commerce Department: Chinese companies must demonstrate sufficient security procedures in order to buy Nvidia H200 chips. $NVDA

data.title: Diana Shipping disappointed by Genco's rejection of acquisition proposal after weeks of delay and lack of engagement.
data.description: The Genco Board's recent decision to reject Diana's acquisition proposal after weeks of delay is a source of deep disappointment. The board has clearly communicated their unwillingness to engage in any discussions regarding the proposal, despite the significant amount of time and effort invested in the process. This development has left stakeholders feeling frustrated and uncertain about the future direction of the company.

data.title: Newmont to release Q4 & full year 2025 results on Feb 19. Conference call at 5:30 pm EST. Replay available on website.
data.description: Newmont Corporation (NYSE: NEM, ASX: NEM, PNGX: NEM) is set to report its full year and fourth quarter 2025 financial results after the North American markets close on Thursday, February 19, 2026. A conference call to discuss these results is scheduled for 5:30 p.m. Eastern Standard Time on the same day, or 9:30 a.m. Australian Eastern Daylight Time on Friday, February 20, 2026. Following the call, a webcast replay will be accessible on the company's website. For conference call details and dial-in number, visit the company's official communication channels.

data.title: Daltile unveils 2026 Trend Report showcasing 5 key interior design trends; includes inspirations and product assortment.
data.description: In Dallas on January 13, 2026, Daltile, known for its innovative style and design, revealed the Daltile Trend Report 2026. This report highlights five major interior design trends for the year, along with their sources of inspiration and details on how these trends are reflected in Daltile's product offerings.

data.title: Mars Materials selected for Shell GameChanger Program to store carbon dioxide; advanced past first stage.  #ClimateAction
data.description: In Houston on January 13, 2026, Mars Materials, also known as MM, revealed its acceptance into the Shell GameChanger project. This initiative involves storing captured carbon dioxide in common products. MM progressed beyond the initial phase of the program, achieving a significant milestone in their efforts. The Shell GameChanger program focuses on...

data.title: Hormel Foods (NYSE: HRL) will hold its 2026 Annual Meeting in person at Austin High School's auditorium in Minnesota.
data.description: The 2026 Annual Meeting of Stockholders for Hormel Foods Corporation (NYSE: HRL), a Fortune 500 company, will take place in person at Austin High School's Richard L. Knowlton Auditorium in Austin, Minnesota. The event is scheduled to be held at the school located at 300 NW 4th Street in Austin.

data.title: Centene Corp (NYSE: CNC) to release 2025 Q4 and year-end financial results at 6:00am ET on Friday.
data.description: Today, St. Louis-based Centene Corporation revealed its plans to unveil the financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025. Centene, a prominent healthcare company dedicated to improving individuals' well-being, is slated to disclose the details at around 6:00 a.m. ET on Friday. Traded on the NYSE under the ticker symbol CNC, the corporation's report is highly awaited by stakeholders and the market at large. This announcement signifies a pivotal moment for Centene as it reflects on its performance during the final quarter and the entirety of the year 2025.

data.title: Richard A. Johnson joins Board of Directors at Advance Auto Parts.
data.description: According to recent reports, the unemployment rate in the country has reached an all-time low of 3.8%. This marks a significant decrease from the previous rate of 4.2%. Additionally, the number of new jobs created in the last month exceeded expectations by reaching 250,000, far surpassing the projected 200,000. Experts attribute this positive trend to a growing economy and increasing consumer confidence. The national GDP also showed a growth of 3.5% in the last quarter, indicating a strong and thriving market. This data highlights a promising outlook for the country's economic future.

data.title: Uber will discuss Q4 and full year 2025 financial results on Feb 4th at 5:00 a.m. PT (8:00 a.m. ET). Live webcast available. Replay accessible for 90 days.
data.description: Uber Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: UBER) is set to host its quarterly conference call on February 4th to review the financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025. The call will take place at 5:00 a.m. Pacific Time (8:00 a.m. Eastern Time). Interested parties can tune into a live webcast of the conference call and access earnings release materials on Uber’s Investor Relations website at investor.uber.com. A recording of the call will also be available for playback for a minimum of 90 days following the initial broadcast.

data.title: Oak Valley Community Bank appoints Carlos Chavez as VP, Branch Manager for Stockton Branch at 2935 West March Lane.
data.description: On January 13, 2026, Oakdale, California - Oak Valley Community Bank, a subsidiary of Oak Valley Bancorp (NASDAQ: OVLY), announced the appointment of Carlos Chavez as Vice President and Branch Manager. Chavez will lead operations at the Stockton Branch located at 2935 West March Lane. In his new role, he will focus on enhancing client relationships, overseeing branch activities, and fostering growth through a dedication to exceptional service. Additionally, Chavez will cater to the financial requirements of the community members and businesses in Stockton, aiming to bolster Oak Valley's footprint in the area.

data.title: Murphy USA to report Q4 2025 results on Feb 4th after market closes with Q&A session on Feb 5th at 10:00am CT. Live webcast available.
data.description: EL DORADO, Arkansas - Murphy USA Inc. (NYSE: MUSA) is set to disclose its financial performance for the fourth quarter of 2025 on Wednesday, February 4, 2026, after the market closes. Alongside the release, there will be pre-recorded management comments available to investors. The company will further host a webcasted question and answer session regarding the results on Thursday, February 5, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. CT. All interested parties can access the management remarks on the Investor Relations segment of Murphy USA's website at http://ir.corporate.murphyusa.com. The live question and answer session will commence at the specified time.

data.title: Advanced Drainage Systems (NYSE: WMS) to announce Q3 FY2026 results on Feb 5, 2026; financial results up to December 31, 2025, will be released. CEO Scott Barbour to present.
data.description: In Hilliard, Ohio, Advanced Drainage Systems, Inc. (NYSE: WMS) disclosed plans to unveil its unaudited financial figures for the fiscal third quarter concluding on December 31, 2025, on February 5, 2026, before the market commences trading. The company is a renowned manufacturer within the stormwater and onsite wastewater management sector, catering to diverse applications like commercial, residential, infrastructure, and agricultural needs. President and Chief Executive Officer Scott Barbour will be participating in the announcement.

data.title: Toll Brothers opens 5 luxury home collections in Irvine, Calif. Great Park Neighborhoods.
data.description: Introducing five new exclusive home collections within the popular Great Park Neighborhoods master plan. These luxurious residences provide a range of high-end options for prospective buyers. With a total of five distinctive collections to choose from, this sought-after community offers a variety of upscale living choices.
